overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character navigates under massive elevated highway structures and crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles passing by. The scene features neon-lit cyberpunk architecture with heavy industrial elements and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with police presence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway structure, passing NCPD police vehicles

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked on the side of the road with glowing blue signage

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with circular support pillars
futuristic police vehicle with glowing blue NCPD text on the side
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
tall building with red neon accent lighting on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. NCPD police cars are parked nearby, and the area is illuminated by artificial street lights and neon building signage. The environment is industrial with large concrete support pillars dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian walkway under overpass approaching intersection

events.description: pedestrian passes by on the right side walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, approaching an intersection in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the camera heading in the opposite direction

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the distance through the haze
low concrete wall running along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking under the elevated highway structure, moving deeper into the covered walkway. A pedestrian passes by on the right, and futuristic skyscrapers become visible in the hazy distance ahead. The environment remains industrial with concrete barriers lining the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and street signage

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open intersection area with visible sky
character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at Olivia Street, navigating between lanes of traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Olivia' mounted on a pole
vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
painted white and yellow lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open intersection, transitioning from artificial to mixed lighting. The 'Olivia' street sign becomes visible on the right as the character enters the crosswalk. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background while vehicles pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with digital billboards and passing traffic

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing to cross the wide intersection while observing the passing traffic and surroundings

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car driving through the crosswalk area with headlights on

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying red and white graphics on the left side of the street
curved on-ramp structure connecting to the main elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The character continues crossing the intersection as multiple futuristic vehicles pass by with headlights illuminating the hazy night air. A large digital billboard becomes visible on the left, displaying bright advertisements. The elevated highway ramp curves overhead on the left as the character approaches the far side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing parked NCPD police cars and heavy support pillars under artificial street lighting. As the character moves deeper into the covered walkway, the environment remains industrial with concrete barriers, though futuristic skyscrapers begin to emerge through the hazy distance. The scene then opens as the character emerges from under the overpass into a bustling intersection, passing an Olivia street sign while the lighting shifts to a mix of ambient city glow and vehicle headlights. Finally, the camera follows the character across the crosswalk past a large digital billboard and a curving highway ramp, with futuristic vehicles cutting through the atmospheric night air.
